But still, you need all foundations of the house to be in order,” Sebastian Steinhaeuser, Chief Operating Officer at SAP, tells Bloomberg Intelligence Senior Technology Analyst Anurag Rana. In this episode of Tech Disruptors, the pair discuss SAP’s autonomous enterprise vision, the rise of Joule assistants and agents, and why AI may strengthen the case for cloud migration, data modernization, and appl

title: Guadalajara apuesta al Mundial mientras persiste la crisis de desaparecidos
title_cn: 失踪人员危机持续，瓜达拉哈拉押注世界杯
summary: Entre mariachis, tequila y fútbol, Jalisco espera recibir a miles de fans del Mundial. Pero en sus mismas calles, familiares de desaparecidos mantienen viva una pregunta que aún no tiene respuesta: ¿dónde están? (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Blackstone’s BCRED Caps Redemptions After Investors Seek 10%
title_cn: Blackstone 的 BCRED 在投资者寻求 10% 后设定赎回上限
summary: Blackstone Inc. limited redemptions from its flagship private credit fund for the first time after investors sought to pull 10% of the shares, the latest firm to cap withdrawals amid a continued investor exodus.

title: Bessent Says White House Asked Congress to Eliminate Gas Tax
title_cn: 贝森特称白宫要求国会取消汽油税
summary: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says the Trump administration has asked Congress to eliminate the gas tax during testimony before the House Ways and Means Committee. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sports City: The World Cup Keeps Getting Bigger
title_cn: 体育城：世界杯规模不断扩大
summary: Sports City is back, and this time Bloomberg News' Senior Reporter Randall Williams takes the viewers to the most watched sports showdown on Earth: The FIFA world cup. This year's games will be hosted in three countries - the US, Mexico and Canada - across 16 cities, with 48 teams competing, the most ever. Let's go! (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Michael Saylor’s Bitcoin Machine Is Misfiring on Every Cylinder
title_cn: 迈克尔塞勒的比特币机器每个气缸都失火了
summary: Michael Saylor built Strategy Inc. around a straightforward idea: raise money to buy Bitcoin, then never sell it. Over time, that simple bet has turned far more complicated.

title: Glazer Family Members Debate Man United Stake Sale
title_cn: 格雷泽家族成员辩论曼联股权出售
summary: Members of the billionaire Glazer family have been debating whether to sell their stake in Manchester United after decades of ownership often blighted by fan protests. Tiwa Adebayo explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dow Average Set for Record High as Chipmakers Sink: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着芯片制造商的下滑，道指创下历史新高：市场结束
summary: Wall Street drove a rotation out of chipmakers into several other industries after Broadcom Inc.’s underwhelming outlook tested the artificial-intelligence trade that has powered the market.

title: Oil Shocks Have Smaller Impact on US Than 1970s, Fed Study Finds
title_cn: 美联储研究发现，石油危机对美国的影响小于 20 世纪 70 年代
summary: Domestic production of oil has significantly reduced the impact of energy-price shocks on US inflation and unemployment since the 1970s, according to new research from the Federal Reserve Bank of Boston.

title: Active Stock Funds Reel as Big Tech’s Grip on Market Strengthens
title_cn: 随着大型科技公司对市场的控制力增强，活跃股票基金陷入困境
summary: Active stock pickers are finding it harder to stomach the pain of technology megacaps’ strengthening grip on the stock market.

title: Nasdaq 100 Slides as Broadcom’s Weak Forecast Halts AI Rally
title_cn: 博通疲弱预测阻碍人工智能涨势，纳斯达克 100 指数下跌
summary: A selloff in technology stocks pulled US equities lower on Thursday after results from Broadcom Inc. drove an unwind in the artificial-intelligence trade that had powered gains over the last several sessions.

title: India Central Bank Says Report on Selling Gold Is Incorrect
title_cn: 印度央行称有关出售黄金的报告不正确
summary: India’s central bank said a report that it’s selling gold is “not correct,” pointing to data showing its physical stock of gold has remained unchanged.

title: Sunshine Silver Mining Rises 11% After $270 Million US IPO
title_cn: 阳光银矿 (Sunshine Silver Mining) 在美国 IPO 融资 2.7 亿美元后股价上涨 11%
summary: Sunshine Silver Mining & Refining Co. shares opened 11% above their IPO price after the mine owner raised $270 million in an upsized US initial public offering.

title: Bloomberg Retracts Incorrect Story on RBI Gold
title_cn: 彭博社撤回有关印度储备银行黄金的错误报道
summary: Bloomberg News retracted a story published June 2 that was based off an incorrect analysis by Bloomberg Economics. The analysis erroneously used same-day domestic gold prices to value RBI’s gold reserves. Using previous day’s London Bullion Market Association price shows that gold holdings were unchanged in May.

title: AI Adoption High, but 'Incredibly Shallow' Says Dr. Rebecca Homkes
title_cn: Rebecca Homkes 博士表示，人工智能的采用率很高，但“极其浅薄”
summary:
Employees across industries continue to adopt AI tools at a rapid rate, yet the technology’s impact on productivity and efficiency can be uneven and muddled. 
Dr. Rebecca Homkes, economist and lecturer at the London Business School, discusses the impact of AI adoption on the global economy and just how companies are using the technology to their advantage. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dangote Is Doubling Giant Oil Refinery and Plotting Trading Push
title_cn: 丹格特正在将巨型炼油厂规模扩大一倍并计划推动贸易
summary: Aliko Dangote has started work to double capacity at his huge oil refinery in Nigeria, which when finished will rival the world’s largest site and give Africa’s richest person a stronger grip of global fuel supply chains.

title: Treasuries Rise as Oil Signals Optimism on Iran Peace Accord
title_cn: 石油信号显示对伊朗和平协议持乐观态度，国债上涨
summary: Treasuries rose and the dollar slipped as investors drew optimism about the prospects of a US-Iran peace deal from a conditional ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon, despite ongoing clashes.

title: Puget CEO Says Climate Costs 'Unfortunately' Get Passed to Customers
title_cn: 普吉特首席执行官表示，气候成本“不幸”转嫁给了客户
summary: Puget Sound Energy CEO Mary Kipp says that wildfires and Washington state's aggressive clean energy policies have led to higher costs to customers. Kipp spoke with Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall on the sidelines of the Edison Electric Institute 2026 Conference in Las Vegas. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pinnacle West CEO Says Arizona Grid Is Ready to Support AI Growth
title_cn: Pinnacle West 首席执行官表示亚利桑那州电网已准备好支持人工智能的发展
summary: Pinnacle West CEO Ted Geisler says that data centers will pay for the energy provider's new grid infrastructure. Geisler spoke with Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall on the sidelines of the Edison Electric Institute 2026 Conference in Las Vegas. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Entergy CEO Says Bulk of Growth Coming From Data Centers
title_cn: Entergy 首席执行官表示大部分增长来自数据中心
summary: Entergy CEO Drew Marsh says that data centers are responsible for close to 10% of the company’s industrial customer growth. Marsh spoke with Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall on the sidelines of the Edison Electric Institute 2026 Conference in Las Vegas. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Morgan Stanley Sees Fed Discounting War in Considering Any Hike
title_cn: 摩根士丹利认为美联储在考虑加息时会打折扣战
summary: The Federal Reserve would probably discount the effects of the Iran war on prices if policymakers decide raising interest rates becomes necessary this year, according to Morgan Stanley’s global head of fixed income research.

title: Whale Rock Talks AI, StemPoint Biotech at Sohn Montreal
title_cn: Whale Rock 在 Sohn 蒙特利尔谈论 AI、StemPoint Biotech
summary: Whale Rock Capital Management LLC founder and chief executive officer Alex Sacerdote said he expects Anthropic PBC to be headed towards half a billion users.

title: Trump Unveils New Tariff Plan for Trade Partners
title_cn: 特朗普公布针对贸易伙伴的新关税计划
summary:
The US is proposing new tariffs of at least 10% on imports from most major trading partners, citing forced-labor practices. 
The 10% rate would apply to partners who prohibit forced labor imports, such as Canada, Mexico, the EU, Taiwan, and the UK.
Ryan Majerus, Partner: International Trade Team at King & Spalding, discusses the path ahead for tariffs, Section 301 investigations, and where refunds stand. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chris Davis on the Risk of Dividend Aristocrats
title_cn: 克里斯·戴维斯谈股息贵族的风险
summary:
Barry sits down with Chris Davis,  Chairman and Portfolio Manager at Davis Funds. They discuss his approach to managing risk and the key elements changing the economy. Chris and Barry also discuss Chris's mentors including Charlie Munger, and how he settled into the family business. 
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Petco Drops on Adjusted Ebitda; Five Below Slides on Growth Concerns | Stock Movers
title_cn: Petco 调整后 Ebitda 下跌；下面五张关于增长担忧的幻灯片|库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Petco (WOOF) shares tumble after the pet health and wellness company’s adjusted Ebitda forecast for the second quarter came in below the average analyst estimate.
- Five Below (FIVE) shares are down after the retailer reported results, and while the quarter was a “standout,” the growth rate might be peaking, according to Jefferies. Citi said the unchanged 2H26 guidance feeds into the bear case that comps will slow over next year. 
- PVH (PVH) shares tumble after reaffirmed adjusted earnings-per-share guidance from the owner of the Calvin Klein and Tommy Hilfiger brands missed consensus estimates. Analysts note sustained pressures from the Middle East conflict. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Falls After Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire Even as Clashes Persist
title_cn: 以色列-黎巴嫩停火后，尽管冲突持续，油价仍下跌
summary: Oil fell as a conditional ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon offered to ease the way toward a US-Iran peace deal, even as the truce was marred by ongoing clashes.

title: Raw Sugar Falls for Third Straight Day, Surrenders Early Gains
title_cn: 原糖连续第三天下跌，回吐早盘涨幅
summary: Raw sugar futures gave up earlier gains in New York as the market struggled to snap a recent losing streak, with a drop in crude futures and expectations of a large Brazilian cane harvest continuing to weigh on the market.

title: Trafigura Pays Record Dividend as Profit Hits $4 Billion
title_cn: 托克派发创纪录股息，利润达 40 亿美元
summary: Trafigura Group made a record payout to its top traders and executives as the commodity trading giant reaped profits of over $4 billion in the first half of its financial year.

title: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon on the Coming Mega IPOs
title_cn: 高盛首席执行官大卫·所罗门谈即将到来的大型首次公开募股
summary:
As companies like Anthropic and SpaceX file to go public, 2026 may turn out to be a year of mega IPOs.

Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon joins Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway on the Odd Lots podcast to discuss banking in the age of AI and why it's still "good for the US to have the biggest, most important companies in the world."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Databricks CEO Plans to Avoid IPO During Year of Huge Offerings
title_cn: Databricks 首席执行官计划在巨额发行之年避免 IPO
summary: Databricks, a data software company, plans to sell shares to the public at some point, but won’t tap the public markets this year amid a flurry of planned tech IPOs.

title: Bloomberg Tech Conference Kicks Off in San Francisco
title_cn: 彭博技术会议在旧金山开幕
summary: The downtown skyline of San Francisco. Photographer: Jason Henry/Bloomberg

title: Emerging-Market Stocks Fall as Broadcom Miss Revives AI Concerns
title_cn: 博通小姐重燃人工智能担忧，新兴市场股市下跌
summary: Emerging-market equities headed for the sharpest drop in roughly three weeks as Asian technology heavyweights retreated after a disappointing outlook from Broadcom Inc. raised concerns about the scale of the artificial-intelligence rally.

title: Exelon CEO Sees Daily Cybersecurity Threats
title_cn: Exelon 首席执行官看到日常网络安全威胁
summary: Exelon CEO Calvin Butler says the energy company needs to be diligent every day against cybersecurity threats to its grid. Butler spoke with Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall on the sidelines of the Edison Electric Institute 2026 Conference in Las Vegas. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Data Center Parts Maker Xnrgy Said to Mull $10 Billion Sale
title_cn: 数据中心零部件制造商 Xnrgy 据称考虑出售 100 亿美元
summary: The owners of Xnrgy Climate Systems, a closely held provider of cooling technology and thermal management solutions for AI data centers, are considering a sale that could value the company at as much as $10 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Canada to Provide Funding, Buy Equity Stakes in AI Startups
title_cn: 加拿大将提供资金并购买人工智能初创公司的股权
summary: Canada will provide funding to help artificial intelligence companies scale up, and plans to take equity stakes in the country’s most promising AI firms to accelerate the creation of so-called “national champions”.

title: Peter Thiel’s Family Office Pays Record Rent for Top Miami Tower
title_cn: 彼得·泰尔 (Peter Thiel) 家族办公室为迈阿密顶级大厦支付创纪录的租金
summary: Peter Thiel, who has been expanding his business interests in South Florida, leased office space at Miami’s 830 Brickell skyscraper for his family office, joining a group of finance and tech heavyweights in the heart of the city’s finance district.

title: Arm’s $180 Billion Leap Makes It One of Market’s Priciest Stocks
title_cn: Arm 股价飙升 1800 亿美元，成为市场上最昂贵的股票之一
summary: Arm Holdings Plc has been a relatively expensive stock since the company first issued American depositary receipts in 2023. But a wild surge that has nearly doubled the share price in a matter of weeks is pushing the valuation to levels investors rarely see.

title: Dimon and SpaceX Executives to Pitch IPO to Clients
title_cn: 戴蒙和 SpaceX 高管将向客户推销 IPO
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Chief Executive Officer Jamie Dimon will pitch the upcoming SpaceX IPO to some of the bank's richest clients. He'll be joined by a pair SpaceX executives, but Dimon is still the star. Bloomberg's Sridhar Natarajan reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Broadcom Slides by Most in More Than a Year on AI Outlook Miss
title_cn: 博通在人工智能展望方面的跌幅为一年多以来最大
summary: Broadcom Inc. shares plunged by the most in more than 16 months after the company’s forecast for sales of its artificial intelligence chips disappointed investors.

title: Apollo’s Zelter Expects High-Grade Debt Sales to Top US Treasuries
title_cn: Apollo 的 Zelter 预计高等级债券的销售将超过美国国债
summary: Jim Zelter, president at Apollo Global Management, says the “phenomenal and unprecedented” AI capex boom could cause issues for smaller companies looking to tap the public markets and says investment-grade debt sales will outpace net issuance of US Treasuries this year. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EU Insurance Watchdog Warns on Loan Risks
title_cn: 欧盟保险监管机构对贷款风险发出警告
summary:
European insurers that want to ride the private credit boom need to grasp the risks they face, according to the region’s top watchdog for the industry. 

Speaking to Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua, Petra Hielkema, chair of the European Insurance and Occupational Pensions Authority, said the region has “a multitude” of insurers of varying size, some of which don’t yet have the necessary capabilities. 

Hielkema joined "The Pulse with Francine Lacqua" on Bloomberg TV. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitcoin Has Longest Losing Streak Since August in Bruising Week
title_cn: 比特币在惨痛的一周中出现自八月以来最长的连续下跌
summary: Bitcoin is poised for its longest losing streak since August, weighed down by the Middle East conflict, liquidations of bullish bets and this week’s rare sale of tokens by the dominant corporate buyer.

title: Glazer Family Members Said to Study Manchester United Stake Sale
title_cn: 格雷泽家族成员据说正在研究曼联股权出售
summary:
Some members of the billionaire Glazer family have been debating whether to sell their stake in Manchester United FC, after more than 20 years of ownership that has often been blighted by fan protest, people familiar with the matter told Bloomberg. Several stakeholders in the US-based Glazer family have been studying the possibility of divesting part or all of their holdings in the English Premier League football club, according to the people. 

Deliberations come as Manchester United’s owners face a potential multibillion-pound bill to redevelop the club’s famous Old Trafford stadium in the coming years. On the other hand, the club’s recent qualification for the lucrative UEFA Champions League comes with fresh earnings potential, providing incentive to remain invested. 

Bloomberg's Tiwa Adebayo joined "The Pulse with Francine Lacqua" to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Absa’s Investors Oppose Plan to Boost Executive Pay
title_cn: Absa 投资者反对提高高管薪酬的计划
summary: Absa Group Ltd. faced opposition from some of its largest shareholders over a proposal to boost executive pay at the South African lender’s annual general meeting on Tuesday.

title: Ares' Blair Jacbobson: Disconnect Over Private Credit Headlines
title_cn: 阿瑞斯的布莱尔·雅各布森：因私人信贷头条新闻而断绝联系
summary:
Ares Management Corporation’s co-president Blair Jacobson said there’s a “real disconnect” between negative headlines about private credit and what the firm is seeing across its portfolio companies.

Jacobson said companies worldwide are reporting annual growth of 8% to 12%, and non-accrual rates are lower than the company has seen historically. He joined "The Pulse with Francine Lacqua" on Bloomberg TV. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia-Backed Robotics Startup Generalist AI Valued at $2 Billion
title_cn: Nvidia 支持的机器人初创公司 AI 通才估值达 20 亿美元
summary: The company raised $400 million in a funding round led by Radical Ventures

title: Schneider Electric Banks on AI Boom to Sell €800 Million Debt
title_cn: 施耐德电气银行趁人工智能热潮出售 8 亿欧元债务
summary: Schneider Electric SE is planning to sell €800 million ($930 million) of debt following a powerful rally on the back of its increasing incursion into the business of supporting data centers.

title: Zurich Insurance Expands Data-Center Offering Beyond the US
title_cn: 苏黎世保险将数据中心服务扩展到美国以外
summary: Zurich Insurance Group Plc is widening its offering for data-center projects to Europe and South America as it seeks to profit from the global buildout of infrastructure linked to artificial intelligence.

title: Revolut Co-Founder, CTO Vlad Yatsenko to Step Down From Role
title_cn: Revolut 联合创始人兼首席技术官 Vlad Yatsenko 卸任
summary: Revolut Ltd.’s chief technology officer, Vlad Yatsenko, and Chief Executive Officer Nik Storonsky’s early partner, is stepping down from his position at the digital bank in July.

title: Netflix Top Tech Exec Stone on Integrating AI
title_cn: Netflix 顶级技术执行官 Stone 谈人工智能集成
summary: Elizabeth Stone, Chief Product & Technology Officer at Netflix discusses technology leadership and scaling the platform in the AI era with Bloomberg’s Emily Chang at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft’s AI Chief Says Anthropic Models Are Too Expensive
title_cn: 微软人工智能负责人表示人择模型太贵
summary: The software company’s AI chief is working to build cheaper in-house models

title: Polymarket Lets You Bet on Vibes
title_cn: Polymarket 让您押注 Vibes
summary: By taking bets on social media clout, the prediction market has made itself vulnerable to bots.

title: China’s Robotaxi Dilemma Shows AI Policy Tension Between Growth and Jobs
title_cn: 中国的机器人出租车困境显示了增长与就业之间的人工智能政策紧张
summary: China leads the world on robotaxis, but is finding that competitive edge comes with a price.

title: Thailand’s Richest Man Plans $4.3 Billion Expansion Amid AI Boom
title_cn: 泰国首富计划在人工智能热潮中斥资 43 亿美元扩张
summary: Thailand’s richest man, Sarath Ratanavadi, plans to spend as much as 140 billion baht ($4.3 billion) through Gulf Development Pcl over the next five years to expand data centers and other infrastructure needed to support the artificial intelligence boom.

title: AMLO Breaks Silence to Back Sheinbaum Amid Tensions With US
title_cn: 在与美国关系紧张之际，奥夫拉多尔打破沉默支持希恩鲍姆
summary: Mexico’s former President Andres Manuel Lopez Obrador, who repeatedly pledged to stay out of politics after leaving office, issued a public statement backing President Claudia Sheinbaum and criticizing growing US pressure on her government.

title: Trump Says He Plans to Nominate Blanche for Attorney General
title_cn: 特朗普表示他计划提名布兰奇担任司法部长
summary: President Donald Trump announced that he planned to soon make Todd Blanche, who leads the Justice Department on an acting basis, the “permanent attorney general,” a move that would install a fervent loyalist at the top of the nation’s law enforcement apparatus.

title: Rep. Doggett Accuses Bessent of 'Deception' Over Trump Audit
title_cn: 众议员多格特指责贝森特在特朗普审计中“欺骗”
summary: US Representative Lloyd Doggett grills Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent for not auditing President Donald Trump's finances during testimony before the House Ways and Means Committee. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Supreme Court Says Quick Jury Trial Not Needed on FCC Fines
title_cn: 最高法院表示不需要对 FCC 罚款进行快速陪审团审判
summary: The US Supreme Court ruled that telecommunications companies can’t immediately demand a jury trial when hit with a Federal Communications Commission fine, while saying the carriers need not to pay penalties right away.

title: Romanian President Nominates Adviser Tomac for Premiership
title_cn: 罗马尼亚总统提名总理顾问托马克
summary: Romanian President Nicusor Dan nominated his adviser, Eugen Tomac, as prime minister in a bid to end a political crisis and tackle one of the European Union’s widest budget deficits.

title: Italy, US and France at Odds Over Next Special Envoy to Bosnia
title_cn: 意大利、美国和法国在下任波斯尼亚特使问题上存在分歧
summary: Key nations tasked with selecting the next special envoy to Bosnia and Herzegovina are at odds over whom to appoint to the role and what kind of weight it should carry, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: French Billionaire Pleads for Law Change to Disinherit Kids
title_cn: 法国亿万富翁呼吁修改法律以剥夺儿童的继承权
summary: French billionaire Pierre-Edouard Sterin, who has stirred controversy over his right-wing politics, is pleading with lawmakers to modify rules so he can disinherit his five children, saying he prefers to give his fortune to charity.

title: Iran Says No Progress in US Talks
title_cn: 伊朗表示与美国的谈判没有取得进展
summary:
Iran said there had been no recent progress in talks with the US over an interim peace deal, while fighting persisted in Lebanon despite Washington’s declaration of a ceasefire between Israel and the country.
Dr. Lindsay Newman, Associate Fellow at Chatham House, discusses the latest out of the Middle East as US, Iran talks continue and fighting persists in Lebanon. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ex-Ukraine Foreign Minister Warns Europe Against Putin Talks
title_cn: 乌克兰前外长警告欧洲不要与普京会谈
summary: A Western European initiative to bring Russia into peace talks with Ukraine risks increasing the pressure on Kyiv for concessions, according to Ukraine’s former top diplomat.

title: Petro Backs Away From Proposal to Rewrite Colombian Constitution
title_cn: 石油公司放弃重写哥伦比亚宪法的提议
summary: President Gustavo Petro is walking back his own unpopular proposal to re-write Colombia’s constitution as his ally seeks to win over centrist voters ahead of this month’s election runoff.

title: Hungary to Back Year-Long Extension of EU Sanctions on Russia
title_cn: 匈牙利支持欧盟对俄罗斯制裁延长一年
summary: Hungary said it will back a full year’s extension of the European Union’s sanctions against Russia in a major reversal from its previous role in stonewalling the process, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Supreme Court Bolsters SEC’s Power to Recoup Illegal Gains
title_cn: 最高法院增强 SEC 追回非法收益的权力
summary: The US Supreme Court reinforced the Securities and Exchange Commission’s power to recover illegal profits in a case that centered on one of the agency’s most potent enforcement tools.

title: How Funding Cuts Left the World Vulnerable to Ebola
title_cn: 资金削减如何使世界容易受到埃博拉病毒的影响
summary: A strain with no known treatment or vaccine is spreading fast, and the international system built to contain outbreaks is in crisis.

title: Trump Wins Delay to Jan. 6 Civil Suits During Bid for Immunity
title_cn: 特朗普在争取豁免期间赢得了推迟 1 月 6 日民事诉讼
summary: A federal judge granted President Donald Trump’s request to again pause a collection of lawsuits seeking to hold him responsible for violence at the US Capitol five years ago while he pursues an immunity defense.

title: LinkedIn China Spying Threat Prompts Warning From US, Allies
title_cn: LinkedIn 中国间谍威胁引发美国及其盟友的警告
summary: The US and its “Five Eyes” intelligence partners issued what they said was an unprecedented joint notice warning about attempts by Chinese spies to use websites such as LinkedIn to recruit assets.

title: Starmer Says Musk Is Sowing UK Division After Teen’s Murder
title_cn: 斯塔默称，青少年谋杀案后，马斯克正在英国分部
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer accused Elon Musk of stoking unrest in Britain after the world’s richest man used the murder of a British teen to say official UK police policy requires officers to be racist against White people.

title: Greer Says ‘Deal’s a Deal’ for Those With Capped US Tariffs
title_cn: 格里尔表示，对于美国关税上限的国家来说，“协议就是协议”
summary: President Donald Trump’s trade chief signaled confidence the administration can roll out new tariffs without breaking terms of bilateral agreements, saying “a deal’s a deal” for economies like the European Union and Japan that negotiated caps on the US levies collected on their shipments.

title: Iran Allows Bushehr Nuclear Inspection, Stonewalls Over Uranium
title_cn: 伊朗允许布什尔核检查，在铀问题上设置障碍
summary: Iran permitted monitors at the United Nations atomic watchdog this week to visit its Bushehr nuclear power plant while stonewalling inspectors’ demands to verify the condition and location of its enriched uranium stockpile.

title: Hiring Has Expanded Beyond Healthcare, Richardson Says
title_cn: 理查森表示，招聘范围已经扩展到医疗保健之外
summary: ADP Chief Economist Nela Richardson says the latest payroll data shows hiring has finally broadened beyond health care, with gains across eight out of ten major sectors. US initial jobless claims did rise by 13,000 in the week ending May 30. She speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kuwait Bears Brunt of Iranian Response to US Ship Attacks
title_cn: 科威特首当其冲受到伊朗对美国船只袭击事件的回应
summary: Kuwait, a staunch US ally, has become a key target of Iran as its ceasefire with Washington frays and their clashes escalate.

title: Democrats to Target Trump IRS Immunity in Hearing, Senate Votes
title_cn: 民主党人将在听证会和参议院投票中针对特朗普国税局豁免权
summary: The Treasury secretary has so far demurred, citing ongoing litigation and attorney-client privilege

title: Singapore Denies Forced Labor Claims After Trump Tariff Move
title_cn: 特朗普关税举措后，新加坡否认强迫劳动指控
summary: Singapore denied forced labor allegations from the US, responding after President Donald Trump proposed new tariffs linked to the practice in an attempt to rebuild his protectionist wall.

title: UK and France Finalize Postwar Hormuz Mine-Clearing Mission
title_cn: 英国和法国完成战后霍尔木兹扫雷任务
summary: The UK and France have finalized plans to lead a multinational mine-clearing mission in the Strait of Hormuz within days of an agreement between the US and Iran to reopen the waterway, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: UK Job Cut Notices Surge to Highest Since 2020 as Iran War Bites
title_cn: 伊朗战争爆发，英国裁员通知激增至 2020 年以来最高
summary: The number of British workers that face losing their jobs jumped to its highest in more than five years, the latest sign that the labor market is deteriorating amid the economic effects of conflict in the Middle East.

title: Republican-Led House Votes to Stop Iran War, Rebuking Trump
title_cn: 共和党领导的众议院投票停止伊朗战争，谴责特朗普
summary: The move won’t end US military attacks and still faces a Senate vote.

title: Denmark to Study Whether Wegovy Can Get More People Working
title_cn: 丹麦将研究 Wegovy 能否让更多人工作
summary: The new government in Novo Nordisk A/S’s home country of Denmark wants to test whether weight-loss drugs can help get more people into work, adding a new economic dimension to the debate over obesity treatments.

title: India Seeks Deeper Venezuela Oil Ties After Rodríguez and Modi Meet
title_cn: 罗德里格斯和莫迪会面后，印度寻求与委内瑞拉加深石油联系
summary: India signaled interest in deeper energy ties with Venezuela, including sourcing crude supplies and investments in the country’s oil sector, after acting Venezuelan President Delcy Rodríguez held talks with Prime Minister Narendra Modi in New Delhi.

title: EU and Chinese Trade Chiefs Meet To Defuse Heightened Tensions
title_cn: 欧盟和中国贸易负责人会面缓解紧张局势
summary: European Union and Chinese trade envoys met in Paris Thursday as the bloc weighs new restrictive measures to rebalance the economic relationship.
